name: KOYJ Co., Ltd.
summary: KOYJ Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells composite optical films and materials in South Korea. It offers optical functional, hard coating, and optical and adhesive protection films, as well as cushion sheets; and roll stamping LGP optical materials for notebooks, TVs, and monitors. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Chungju, South Korea.
